creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: Would be good to get more details of the actual config space write the guest OS is making.  I suspect the assertion failure is because we are getting a conflict (looks like from comment #1 that OpenBSD is setting the base address of an I/O BAR to 0, and probably some other BAR is already at I/O port 0, hence the error return and assertion failure).  The bug though in that case is why is OpenBSD writing a 0 base address.  Are we advertising an existing base address of 0 for BARs in bhyve?  If so, that might be the regression.
